# Alchemy project instructions

- For any UI, UX, layout, motion, typography, color, or interaction work, apply the `hig-fantasy-ui` skill in `.github/skills/hig-fantasy-ui/SKILL.md`.
- Use Apple Human Interface Guidelines as inspiration at the level of principles and design critique, not as source material to reproduce.
- Do not copy Apple guide text, screenshots, diagrams, or other visual assets into the repo or generated output.
- Preserve Alchemy's identity: tactile fantasy card play, clear encounter hierarchy, touch-friendly controls, readable contrast, and restrained motion.
- Prefer reusable tokens in `src/index.css`, shadcn-style primitives in `src/components/ui`, and semantic HTML before decorative effects.
